# East Asian Width / grapheme-cluster fixture cases.
#
# Format: each non-blank, non-comment line is `EXPECTED_WIDTH<TAB>STRING`,
# where STRING is a UTF-8 byte sequence (literal — do NOT escape).
# Lines starting with `#` and blank lines are ignored.
#
# Coverage:
#   - ASCII letters / digits / mixed
#   - Mixed Japanese + ASCII
#   - Fullwidth digits, halfwidth katakana
#   - Single emoji presentation
#   - ZWJ family
#   - Skin-tone modifier
#   - Regional Indicator pair (flag)
#   - Combining-mark cluster (e + U+0301)
#   - Lone ZWJ inside ASCII (should contribute 0 width)
5	Hello
12	Hello, 世界!
4	１２
3	ｱｲｳ
2	😀
2	👨‍👩‍👧‍👦
2	👋🏽
2	🇯🇵
4	café
6	ABC‍DEF
